title: FOSTER CARE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY LIVING CASE MANAGEMENT WASCO, SHERMAN, HOOD RIVER COUNTY OFFICE FOSTER CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Foster care homes for people with developmental disabilities. Homes provide residential placement, 24-hour supervision, and assistance with daily living activities. Agency also recruits foster care providers for people with disabilities. 207 West 3rd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Adults with developmental disabilities; call for eligibility requirements to become a foster care provider Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 716-0135 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 716-0135 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Hood River Counties Services: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment * Developmental Issues Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY LIVING CASE MANAGEMENT WASCO, SHERMAN, HOOD RIVER COUNTY OFFICE
